message:
test(mcp-bridge): Enhance compliance suite with decision receipts, stable evidence, and contract introspection

Upgrades the MCP bridge E2E compliance tests to require decision receipts on
all operations and validate stable JSONL evidence logs for audit trails.

Key changes:
- Extract mcp_bridge_operations() helper centralizing all 5 MCP operation
  definitions (tools.list/call, resources.list/read, prompts.list) with
  detailed OperationInfo metadata including risk levels and safety tiers
- stable_object_id() generates deterministic ObjectIds from string labels
  for reproducible receipt and audit event IDs
- assert_report_logs_validate() validates E2E evidence logs are well-formed
  JSONL with stable timestamps and expected field structures
- require_decision_receipt flipped from false to true for default-deny policy
  compliance across the full test suite
- New test: tool call emits receipt, audit event, and stable evidence
- New test: handshake and introspection surface expected operation contract
  (count, capabilities, risk/safety tiers)
- MCP bridge connector.rs updated to align with FCP3 self-check report patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
